meaning: 斯特拉斯堡[法国东北部城市]
examples: The Strasbourg conference was one of the first events on such a scale to reach this conclusion.
In December 1990, Strasbourg hosted the first Ministerial Conference on the protection of Europe's forests.
The Strasbourg conference's main concern was to provide for the future.
Strasbourg, France-based Aventis could wind up being what Vasella has been waiting for: an eager seller.
The tobacconists' revolt in Strasbourg is spearheaded by Patrick Merck, who heads the local professional association.
